properties.text: No pointer may be dereferenced in aspeed_peci_clk_release() in peci-aspeed.c after being freed
properties.assertion: forall free(p) in aspeed_peci_clk_release: no_use(p) after free(p) AND no_double_free(p)

properties.text: No pointer may be dereferenced in peci_bus_device_remove() in core.c after being freed
properties.assertion: forall free(p) in peci_bus_device_remove: no_use(p) after free(p) AND no_double_free(p)

properties.text: auxiliary_device_uninit() in adev_release() calls put_device() which frees the containing struct when refcount reaches 0 via the release callback; any subsequent access to adev->name or kfree(adev) is a use-after-free
properties.assertion: forall callee(f) in adev_release where f transitively calls put_device/kobject_put that may free(adev): no_use(adev) AND no_use(adev->name) after call(f)

properties.text: No pointer may be dereferenced in peci_device_destroy() in device.c after being freed
properties.assertion: forall free(p) in peci_device_destroy: no_use(p) after free(p) AND no_double_free(p)
